slides.title: Your strategic partner for the success of your projects in Central Africa
slides.description: Alpha Conseil supports you in formalizing your business, developing your business plans, and providing tailored legal advice.

slides.title: Transform your vision into a solid and convincing business plan
slides.description: We help you structure your project, convince investors, and secure the necessary funding with robust financial forecasts and a clear strategy.

slides.title: Secure your activities with excellence in legal advice
slides.description: Protect your interests with our expertise in business law, labor law, and Central African taxation. We anticipate risks so you can undertake with confidence.

slides.title: Personalized support for every step of your project
slides.description: Whether you are a sole entrepreneur, SME, or international investor, we adapt our services to your specific needs to guarantee your success in CAR.

services.title: Solutions adapted to your needs
services.description: Alpha Conseil provides a dedicated team of experts to support you at every stage of your business development.

items.title: Business Formalization
items.description: We assist you with all administrative procedures to legally create and register your company in the Central African Republic. From drafting statutes to obtaining the RCCM.

items.title: Business Plan
items.description: Development of solid and realistic business plans to structure your project, convince investors, and obtain financing from banks and financial institutions.

items.title: Legal Advice
items.description: Assistance and advice in business law, labor law, and taxation. We secure your contracts and help you navigate the Central African legal environment with complete peace of mind.

about.title: Excellence at the service of your ambition
about.description: Based in Bangui, Alpha Conseil was born from the desire to offer entrepreneurs and investors in the Central African Republic international-standard support. We understand local challenges and provide concrete solutions to secure and sustain your investments.
benefits: In-depth local expertise of the Central African market
Strong network of partners in Bangui

whyChooseUs.title: Our clients' trust, our best reference
whyChooseUs.description: Discover what makes Alpha Conseil the preferred partner for entrepreneurs and investors in the Central African Republic.

reasons.title: Recognized local expertise
reasons.description: In-depth knowledge of the Central African administrative, legal, and economic landscape, acquired through hundreds of successfully supported clients.

reasons.title: Personalized support
reasons.description: Every project is unique. We offer tailor-made follow-up with a dedicated contact throughout your journey.

reasons.title: Speed of execution
reasons.description: We meet your deadlines. Thanks to our mastery of administrative processes, we handle your files in record time without compromising on quality.

reasons.title: Confidentiality & Professionalism
reasons.description: Discretion and rigor are at the heart of our business. Your sensitive information is handled with the strictest confidentiality.

reasons.title: Network & Partners
reasons.description: We have a strong network of partners (banks, notaries, lawyers, administrations) to open the right doors for you quickly.

reasons.title: Priority WhatsApp Support
reasons.description: Our clients benefit from direct access to their advisor via WhatsApp for responsive follow-up and quick answers to all your questions.

banner.title: Ready to work with us?
banner.description: Contact us now to discuss your project with no obligation. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
banner.footer: Available 7/7 • Guaranteed response within 24h • Free initial consultation

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.description: Our clients' satisfaction is our greatest pride. Discover their feedback.

items.name: Christiane M.
items.role: Executive returning to Bangui from Paris
items.quote: Alpha Conseil supported me in setting up my consulting firm in Bangui. Their knowledge of the local administrative landscape saved me valuable time. In two weeks, I had my RCCM and all my documents in order.

items.name: Arsène B.
items.quote: I entrusted Alpha Conseil with writing my business plan for an agro-pastoral park project. The document was so solid that it convinced my bank on the first presentation. Rare professionalism in Bangui.

items.name: Nguéssé Family
items.quote: We had concerns about the legal aspects of our real estate investment. Alpha Conseil secured every contract and saved us from pitfalls we wouldn't have seen alone. Indispensable support.

items.name: Olivier M.
items.quote: First business creation for me. The Alpha Conseil team was remarkably patient and clear. Every step was explained, every document carefully drafted. I highly recommend them.

items.name: Sophie K.
items.quote: Alpha Conseil has been helping us with our NGO's legal compliance for two years. Their responsiveness and expertise in Central African law are impeccable. A reliable partner you can count on.

items.name: Jean-Pierre L.
items.quote: I had a tax dispute that had been dragging on for months. Alpha Conseil took over the case and found a negotiated solution in less than a month. Their local network and pragmatic approach make the difference.

cta.text: Join our satisfied clients and bring your projects to life.

chatbot.welcome: 👋 Hello! I am Alpha Conseil's virtual assistant. How can I help you? Ask me a question or choose from the suggestions below.

faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer:
Alpha Conseil offers three main services:

1️⃣ **Business Formalization** — Legal creation and registration of your company in CAR (RCCM, statutes, tax registration).

2️⃣ **Business Plan** — Development of solid business plans to convince investors and banks.

3️⃣ **Legal Advice** — Assistance in business law, contracts, taxation, and labor law.

Would you like more details on any of these services?

faqs.question: How much do your services cost?
faqs.answer:
Our prices vary by service:

• **Formalization**: from 250,000 FCFA
• **Business Plan**: from 350,000 FCFA
• **Legal Advice**: from 200,000 FCFA

These are indicative prices. A free personalized quote will be provided after reviewing your project. Contact us to discuss!

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: We are based in **Bangui**, Central African Republic. We support both local clients and international investors looking to establish themselves in CAR.

faqs.question: How can I contact you?
faqs.answer:
You can contact us by:

📞 **Phone**: (+236) 75 29 89 84 / 72 35 66 76
📧 **Email**: contact@alphaconseil.com
💬 **WhatsApp**: +236 75 29 89 84

Or fill out the contact form on our website — we will respond within 24h.

faqs.question: What are the deadlines?
faqs.answer:
Deadlines vary by service:

• **Business Formalization**: 1 to 2 weeks on average
• **Business Plan**: 2 to 3 weeks depending on complexity
• **Legal Advice**: within 48h for emergencies

We commit to keeping you informed at every step.

faqs.question: Who is Alpha Conseil?
faqs.answer:
Alpha Conseil is a consulting firm based in Bangui, born from the desire to offer entrepreneurs and investors in CAR international-standard support.

Our team has over 10 years of combined experience supporting businesses in Central Africa. We combine local expertise with professional rigor to secure and sustain your projects.
